name: Beef Gravy W/Homemade Beef Gravy Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cold water into a small saucepan.
2. Stir in the beef gravy mix with a whisk.
3. Continuously stir over medium heat until the gravy is smooth and slightly thickened. This should take about 2-3 minutes.
4. The finished mixture will make approximately 1 cup of gravy.
